message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker metadata from concurrent agent sessions

Update .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue status changes and metadata
refinements from multi-agent PERF-3X phase work.

Why: Multiple concurrent agents working on bd-3ar8v performance beads
updated issue acceptance criteria, notes, and status fields. This commit
captures the accumulated tracker state so downstream agents and the br
CLI see consistent issue metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
